description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the nixos/nix Docker image for all jobs. Add a job called tests (default stage) with a before_script that updates Nix and installs git, wget, and bash via nix-env -u and nix-env -i commands. In the script step install cabal-install with nix-env -i and then run the test suite using nix-shell -A env --command 'cabal v1-test --show-details=direct'. The pipeline does not define any caches, artifacts, or special rules, so the job runs on every pipeline execution.
